login_flow.notes: Login page renders cleanly, form validation works (shows errors on empty submit), successful login shows 'Welcome back!' toast. /logout route returns 404 (minor).

dashboard.notes: Loads with real data: 3 clusters, 4 anomalies (2 critical/1 warning/1 info), stat cards visible. Cluster cards grouped by environment (Production/Dev). Search, filter, and tag controls present.

clusters_page.notes: Clusters list in table view with Name, Provider, Health, Access, Version, Nodes, Endpoint, Last Seen, Actions columns. All 3 clusters listed. Cluster detail page very rich: 1 node (Ready), 14 pods listed, recent events table with 9741+ entries.

theme_toggle.notes: Theme cycles Light → System → Dark correctly. Dark mode renders well across all tested pages.

navigation.notes: All sidebar links accessible: Dashboard, Clusters, Shared Dashboards, Health, Deployments, Events, Alerts, Anomalies, Logs, AI Assistant, Feature Flags, Webhooks, Users, Audit Log, Settings, Karpenter, Teams, Permissions. Command palette button present (⌘K).

deployments_page.notes: Page loads correctly but shows 0 deployments. Environment-blocked: requires connected live cluster. UI design is correct.

pod_management.notes: Pods visible in cluster detail view (14 pods for vik-minikube). Pod list shows name, namespace, status (Running/Succeeded), age, and delete action. Delete button per pod present.

ui_quality.notes: Clean, professional dark/light theme. Good typography, structured layouts, breadcrumbs, search/filter controls throughout. favicon.svg returns 500 error (minor).

issues.title: favicon.svg returns 500 Internal Server Error
issues.actual: GET /favicon.svg returns 500 on every page load

issues.title: No /logout route — returns 404
issues.expected: Redirect to login page or handle logout

issues.title: Deployments page empty without cluster selection
issues.steps: Navigate to /deployments without selecting a cluster
issues.expected: Shows prompt to select a cluster
